/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc ../../lib/libopencv_videoio460.a CMakeFiles/opencv_videoio.dir/src/videoio_registry.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_videoio.dir/src/videoio_c.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_videoio.dir/src/cap.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_videoio.dir/src/cap_images.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_videoio.dir/src/cap_mjpeg_encoder.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_videoio.dir/src/cap_mjpeg_decoder.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_videoio.dir/src/backend_plugin.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_videoio.dir/src/backend_static.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/opencv_videoio.dir/src/container_avi.cpp.obj
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib ../../lib/libopencv_videoio460.a
